title: selliguea hamiltoniana
intro: Selliguea hamiltoniana, also known as Selaginella trigyna or Trillidium hamiltonianum, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Selliguea hamiltoniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and compresses.
